message:
test(core): continue runtime_compat migration for runtime and mux_client tests

runtime.rs:
- Add run_async_test() helper using RuntimeBuilder::current_thread()
- Convert runtime_config_defaults_are_reasonable and runtime_can_be_created
  from #[tokio::test] to explicit run_async_test() wrappers, completing
  the runtime_compat migration for this module

mux_client.rs:
- Add send_paste_write_timeout_when_server_stops_reading_after_handshake
  test: verifies that when the server completes handshake but then stops
  reading, the client's write path eventually times out rather than
  blocking indefinitely. This covers the back-pressure timeout scenario
  complementing the existing read-timeout test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
